name: Strawberry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
Directions for Cream Filling: Mix first 4 ingredients in a bowl. Gradually stir in milk until combined.
Stirring constantly, bring to a boil over medium heat; reduce heat and cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened.
Stir a small amount of the hot mixture into the egg; return to the remaining hot mixture. Bring just to a boil, stirring constantly.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Whisk together; fold in whipped cream and vanilla.
Directions for pie: Toast almonds until lightly browned, then sprinkle over the bottom of the cooled pie crust.
Fill the crust with chilled Cream Filling. Halve 2 cups of strawberries and pile atop the filling.
Glaze: Crush remaining berries; add water; cook 2 minutes; strain. Mix sugar and cornstarch in a bowl.
Gradually stir in berry juice until smooth. Cook, stirring occasionally, until thickened and clear. Tint to desired color with food coloring.
Let cool slightly before pouring over the halved strawberries. Keep refrigerated until serving time. Serve with whipped cream, if desired.
